name: org.agntcy/devops-tools
description: Curated collection of agent skills for common DevOps workflows: container builds, Kubernetes operations, infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD, and observability. Every member ships as an OASF agent-skill artifact so any compatible agent can load them uniformly.

data.name: docker-cli
data.description:
# Docker CLI

Agent skill for building, running, and publishing OCI container images with the Docker CLI. Wraps `docker build`, `docker run`, `docker push`, `docker compose`, and `docker buildx` with schema-checked arguments and safe defaults.

## Features
- **Reproducible builds**: Enforces `--pull`, `--sha256` locking, and BuildKit.
- **Multi-arch**: Uses `buildx` for `linux/amd64,linux/arm64` by default.
- **Registry auth**: Reads credentials from `DOCKER_CONFIG` or environment.

## Getting Started
```
agent load docker-cli
agent invoke docker-cli.build --context . --tag ghcr.io/org/app:v1
```

data.name: kubectl
data.description:
# kubectl

Agent skill for interacting with Kubernetes clusters. Provides typed wrappers over `kubectl get`, `apply`, `rollout`, `logs`, `port-forward`, plus safe defaults (namespace pinning, dry-run first, RBAC checks).

## Features
- **Namespace isolation**: All operations require an explicit namespace.
- **Dry-run first**: Every mutating call runs `--dry-run=server` before applying.
- **Context switching**: Uses `KUBECONFIG` contexts, never modifies them.

## Getting Started
```
agent load kubectl
agent invoke kubectl.apply --file deploy.yaml --namespace prod
```

data.name: terraform
data.description:
# Terraform

Agent skill for HashiCorp Terraform: `init`, `plan`, `apply`, `destroy`, and workspace management. Enforces plan review before apply and locks state via the configured backend.

## Features
- **Plan-then-apply**: `apply` requires an approved plan file.
- **State locking**: Never runs unlocked operations.
- **Provider pinning**: Fails if `.terraform.lock.hcl` is missing.

## Getting Started
```
agent load terraform
agent invoke terraform.plan --dir infra/ --out tfplan
agent invoke terraform.apply --plan tfplan
```

data.name: github-actions
data.description:
# GitHub Actions

Agent skill for authoring, triggering, and inspecting GitHub Actions workflows. Uses the GitHub REST/GraphQL APIs with fine-grained tokens.

## Features
- **Workflow linting**: Runs `actionlint` before commit.
- **Re-run failed jobs**: Targets specific failed jobs, not the whole run.
- **Secret-safe**: Never echoes secret values to logs.

## Getting Started
```
agent load github-actions
agent invoke github-actions.trigger --repo org/app --workflow release.yml --ref main
```

data.name: prometheus-query
data.description:
# Prometheus Query

Agent skill for querying Prometheus and Alertmanager. Wraps PromQL execution, alert-rule inspection, and target scraping status.

## Features
- **Range vs instant**: Auto-selects based on the requested time window.
- **Query timeouts**: Enforces a per-call timeout to protect the server.
- **Read-only**: No admin API calls; no rule mutations.

## Getting Started
```
agent load prometheus-query
agent invoke prometheus-query.instant --query 'up{job="api"}'
```

resources.name: local_filesystem
resources.description: Read/write access to the working directory for source files, plans, and manifests.

resources.name: docker_daemon
resources.description: Access to the local Docker daemon socket for build/run/push operations.

resources.name: kubernetes_api
resources.description: Access to the Kubernetes API server via KUBECONFIG contexts.

resources.name: cloud_provider_api
resources.description: Access to cloud provider APIs (AWS, GCP, Azure) for Terraform runs.

resources.name: github_api
resources.description: Access to the GitHub API for workflow inspection and triggering.

resources.name: prometheus_api
resources.description: Read-only access to the Prometheus HTTP API.
